response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, fluent asserts), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management experience beyond informal mentorship and lacks mobile platform focus, which is a preferred qualification.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven technical leadership through open-source projects and workshop facilitation
Broad cross-platform expertise including mobile (iOS/Apple TV) and distributed systems
concerns: No clear documented experience in formal people management or team leadership roles
Limited evidence of strategic roadmap planning or organizational change leadership
Mobile platform experience is incidental (iOS app maintenance), not core to his career focus
